labels.evidence: had a very strong chemical scent from the filters and machine

text: Edit: Discovered it was not the machines but the filters. Trying to find HEPA filters without a sticky sweet chemical scent.Bought 2 after my old Coways gave out (no scent everz). These two had a very strong chemical scent from the filters and machine. Exchanging in hopes this helps. Not sure why an air purifier company utilities chemicals in the manufacturing/processing that cause the very problems they are trying to address. Hoping the new ones are from a different batch as the old ones were great & never had a scent from the machine or replacement filters.

The wipes stay warm

text: I spent hours researching wipe warmers with bad reviews of mold, or drying wipes out (and even burning them) but this one exceeds my expectations!!  I’m able to keep a pack of wipes in the warmer without taking them out of the packaging. The wipes stay warm and don’t dry out. The warmer is large enough to hold a pack and a half of wipes. The only draw back is that the buttons are sensitive but that’s not even a big deal. Ove had it for a couple of months now and overall I would continue to buy this product again and again- wish I bought it sooner!

text: I recently purchased this red and infrared light therapy lamp, and it has exceeded my expectations. The combination of 660nm red light and 850nm infrared light has noticeably improved my skin's firmness and elasticity after just a few weeks of daily use. The innovative curved design allows for focused treatment, and the adjustable stand makes it convenient to use anywhere in my home. It's a cost-effective alternative to salon treatments, and I appreciate the thoughtful inclusion of accessories like the hook and long power cord. This device has become an essential part of my wellness routine, and I highly recommend it to anyone seeking the benefits of light therapy.
